attributes__keywords: Huawei, nova 15 Max, 8GB RAM, 256GB storage, 4G LTE, Android
name: HUAWEI nova 15 Max 8G+256GB Golden Black
attributes__bullet_point_5: 8500 mAh battery capacity with lithium ion polymer battery
attributes__bullet_point_6: EMUI 14.2 operating system and 4G LTE network
attributes__product_description: The HUAWEI nova 15 Max is a powerful smartphone with a 6.84 inches HD+ display. It is powered by a Kirin 8000A processor and comes with 8GB of RAM and 256GB of internal storage. The phone has a rear camera with 50MP and a front camera with 8MP. It also features a large 8500 mAh battery capacity with a lithium ion polymer battery. The phone runs on the EMUI 14.2 operating system and supports 4G LTE network. Additionally, it has IP65 water and dust resistance, X Key, HOTA online update, OTG, and Huawei Share. The phone is available in Golden Black color.
attributes__special_features: IP65 water and dust resistance, X Key, HOTA online update, OTG, Huawei Share
